openGroupLines: Enter a name, location, time, and password — start a meetup in 30 seconds.
Once created, share the QR code / link to your LINE group or FB community and players can scan to join. Your meetup intro and contact link show up in the lobby.
collectLines: Anyone with the password joins directly, no approval needed.

Turn on “Public sign-up” and people without the password can register too (they can leave a note and bring family). You approve them one by one in the “Drop-in sign-up review” area. You can set a slot limit — even when it's full, sign-ups keep coming and you pick who's in.
onsiteLines: Each court card shows who's playing and who's in the queue. You can queue people for them, remove someone, or swap queued players between courts.
Turn on “Fair Play” to automatically hold back people who've played too much so those who've played less get a turn. Ended a game by mistake? You can undo within 10 minutes.
feesLines: Mark members as “drop-in fee paid,” then filter who still hasn't paid with one tap.
Games and minutes per person are tallied automatically. Every action you take is logged, and the history stays after the meetup ends.
